title: senecio × saundersii
intro: Senecio × saundersii, also known as New Zealand groundsel, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio × saundersii include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
